{{Location|title=Koryeo|imagecaption=Map of Koryeo|type=|image=File:KoryeoFullMap.png}}

== Koryeo ==
A magnificent country that boasts brilliant views and marvelous history!

Welcome to Koryeo. Cheongdam-dong, Apujeong-dong, Samcheong-dong, and Gwanghwamun Square are good spots to visit! A small reminder: Do not trust those low-price plastic surgeries or dining recommendations, and please think twice before purchasing any jewelry, pearls, blessing stones, elixirs, everywhere gate, or any Coles Notes to KungFu Master from any unknown source.

Koryeo is the 1st of 8 [[Realms]].
{{realm table}}

==INTEL==
See [[Koryeo INTEL]] for INTEL tables

==Apostles ==
See [[Koryeo Apostles]] for each Apostles' stats

==Card Conversions==
See [[Koryeo Cards]] for a list of all limited cards in Koryeo and what they can be redeemed for.

==Key Clue Records==
See [[Koryeo Key Clues]] for a list of all Key Clues in Koryeo, how to complete them, and what they reward.

==Realm Trait - Iron Ball==
See [[Deadly Ironball]] for information on Ironball cost, stats, and unsealing. 

[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Koryeo]]
